balanced_starter.name: Balanced Starter Team
balanced_starter.description: Perfect team composition for early to mid-game progression

members.reason: Fast initiative and reliable speed attacks

elder_dragon_destroyer.name: Elder Dragon Destroyer
elder_dragon_destroyer.description: Specialized team for taking down Elder Dragons

members.reason: Overwhelming physical damage and dragon element
Peak fire power and legendary status

speed_domination.name: Speed Domination
speed_domination.description: Ultra-fast team that overwhelms with speed attacks

members.reason: Flying speed attacks and electric support

elemental_mastery.name: Elemental Mastery
elemental_mastery.description: Covers all elements for maximum type coverage

members.reason: Elegant water attacks and bubble mastery

balance_considerations: Always include at least one Speed, Power, and Technical type
Consider elemental coverage for different enemy weaknesses
Include at least one healing or support monster for sustainability
synergy_factors: Attack type diversity - cover all three combat types
Speed tiers - ensure proper turn order management
Role distribution - tank, DPS, and support roles
progression_advice: Start with balanced teams before specializing
Upgrade monsters evenly to maintain team synergy
Consider monster availability when planning teams
Adapt teams based on story progression and enemy types

tank.description: High HP and defense, absorbs damage for the team

dps.description: High damage output, focuses on eliminating enemies quickly

support.description: Provides healing, buffs, or utility for the team

speed_lead.description: Goes first, sets up combos or applies pressure
